heading: Administration by Office of Career Education
label: 2503 Administration by Office of Career Education
text: The provisions of this subchapter shall be carried out by the Secretary of Education through the Office of Career Education established pursuant to .section 2612a(c) of this title
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, has been omitted from the Code.Section 2612a of this title
